title: Day 08 Reflection
description: Solidify async React patterns before Day 09 debouncing and custom hooks.

prompts.question: Draw or describe your weather app's state machine: idle, loading, error, success. What triggers each transition?
prompts.guidance: Use your actual state variable names.

prompts.question: Did you hit infinite API calls or a missing dependency bug? What caused it and how did you fix it?
prompts.guidance: If not, explain how you would diagnose using Network tab and ESLint.

prompts.question: Why does fetch not throw on HTTP 404? How did you handle that in your code?
Fetch vs Axios — which did you use and would you change that decision on a larger team project?
prompts.guidance: Trade-offs matter more than the choice itself.

prompts.question: What would you add before showing this weather dashboard in a portfolio review?
prompts.guidance: Think error boundary mention, accessibility, env var docs, tests.
